briefdescription.para: Implementation of Finite State Machine (FSM) for firmware updates.

simplesect.para: (c) 2023 AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. All rights reserved.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: This source file implements the Finite State Machine (FSM) for handling firmware updates in the AXO X1 device. The FSM provides mechanisms for managing different stages of firmware updates, including OTA commands, firmware info handling, download, and restart. The FSM is realized through a set of state classes, each representing a specific state and its associated behavior.
This source code is confidential and proprietary information of AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. You may not disclose, copy, or distribute this source code or any part thereof without the explicit permission
